findings.description: Interpolated SQL can create injection vulnerabilities.
evidence: mai-api/src/grpc/server.rs:68 /// the REST server in a `tokio::select!` or `tokio::join!`.
mai-api/src/sealer_builder.rs:3 //! Select the [`StoreSealer`] implementation for the compliance audit
mai-api/src/state.rs:78 /// SHIP-07 Slice B: selected `POST /v1/auth/exchange_token` mode.
findings.title: SQL injection via string interpolation

findings.description: Secrets should not be committed to source.
findings.title: Hardcoded API keys and secrets

findings.description: GET endpoints should not mutate server state.
evidence: mai-api/src/audit.rs:440 /// Get the writer reference for direct queries.
mai-api/src/config.rs:401 /// Get a receiver that yields updated configs when the file changes.
findings.title: State-changing GET routes

findings.description: Sync Node file I/O blocks the event loop.
evidence: .integrity/mcp-server/server.js:20 import { readFileSync, writeFileSync, mkdirSync, copyFileSync, existsSync, statSync } from "fs";
findings.title: Synchronous file I/O blocking event loop

findings.description: Database calls inside loops can create N+1 behavior.
findings.title: N+1 database query pattern

findings.description: Repeated JSON serialization in loops adds CPU overhead.
findings.title: JSON.parse/stringify inside loops

findings.description: Large files may need focused modules.
findings.title: God files over 300 lines

findings.description: Empty bodies and placeholder panics create false confidence.
evidence: .integrity/mcp-server/server.js:10 * - pre_stage_check: Full verification pass before git add
.integrity/mcp-server/server.js:35 description: "Check a single file for corruption: null bytes, truncation vs HEAD, bracket balance, syntax validity. Returns structured pass/fail report.",
.integrity/mcp-server/server.js:112 return content.includes(0) ? { pass: false, detail: "Null bytes detected" } : { pass: true };
.integrity/mcp-server/server.js:125 return { pass: false, detail: `Brace imbalance: { ${open} } ${close} delta ${open - close}` };
.integrity/mcp-server/server.js:128 return { pass: true, warning: `Minor brace mismatch: delta ${open - close}` };
findings.title: Empty function bodies

findings.description: TODO/FIXME/HACK/BUG markers indicate unfinished work.
evidence: docs/ADAPTER-COMPLETION-MATRIX.md:66 | **BUG** | `test_adapter.py:99` asserts `embed()` returns `[0.1, 0.2, 0.3]` but `embed()` returns an `Embedding` dataclass — should assert on `.vector` or `.in
docs/ADAPTER-COMPLETION-MATRIX.md:115 | **BUG** | `test_adapter.py:84–85` asserts `healthy=True` but the adapter returns degraded status when the engine is not ready — the test contradicts the adapt

docs/dougherty/JOHN-REMEDIATION-PLAN.md:54 | 1 | email + QUA-004 | "Extensive TODO placeholders and incomplete implementations throughout" | QUA-004 + Code Smell `Placeholder Implementation` HIGH | Mixed

docs/dougherty/JOHN-REMEDIATION-ROSTER.md:1156 - Adapter stubs: `wc -l` of adapters/*/adapter.py + `grep -c NotImplementedError` = 0 for each. **Important nuance:** John's "extensive TODO placeholders" claim
docs/JOHN-REMEDIATION-PLAN.md:54 | 1 | email + QUA-004 | "Extensive TODO placeholders and incomplete implementations throughout" | QUA-004 + Code Smell `Placeholder Implementation` HIGH | Mixed
docs/JOHN-REMEDIATION-ROSTER.md:1219 - Adapter stubs: `wc -l` of adapters/*/adapter.py + `grep -c NotImplementedError` = 0 for each. **Important nuance:** John's "extensive TODO placeholders" claim
docs/RC1-TESTER-FEEDBACK.md:324 > Extensive use of TODO placeholders and incomplete implementations
mai-adapters/src/manager.rs:586 // TODO: Track in-flight request count per adapter.
findings.title: Unresolved TODO/FIXME markers

findings.description: Mixing .then and async/await can reduce maintainability.
findings.title: Mixed async patterns

findings.description: Many exports can indicate an unfocused module.
findings.title: Modules with 15+ exports

findings.description: 4+ indentation levels make code harder to read.
findings.title: Deeply nested code

findings.description: Promise chains without catch can hide rejections.
findings.title: .then() without .catch()

findings.description: Hardcoded localhost URLs may not deploy cleanly.
evidence: .github/workflows/ci.yml:126 #       run: curl -s http://localhost:11434/api/tags || (echo "Ollama not available" && exit 1)
findings.title: Hardcoded localhost URLs in source

findings.description: Docker images should pin tags or digests.
findings.title: Unpinned Docker base images

findings.description: Tests should assert outcomes.
findings.title: Test files without assertions

findings.description: Excessive mocks may test mocks rather than behavior.
findings.title: Mock-everything antipattern

findings.description: Docstrings and API comments should not mask unimplemented behavior.
evidence: mai-sdk-rs/src/lib.rs:768 documented item ends in placeholder macro
mai-sdk-rs/src/lib.rs:782 documented item ends in placeholder macro
mai-sdk-rs/src/lib.rs:787 documented item ends in placeholder macro
mai-sdk-rs/src/lib.rs:792 documented item ends in placeholder macro
mai-sdk-rs/src/lib.rs:807 documented item ends in placeholder macro
mai-sdk-rs/src/lib.rs:812 documented item ends in placeholder macro
mai-sdk-rs/src/lib.rs:819 documented item ends in placeholder macro
mai-sdk-rs/src/lib.rs:824 documented item ends in placeholder macro
mai-sdk-rs/src/lib.rs:829 documented item ends in placeholder macro
mai-sdk-rs/src/lib.rs:836 documented item ends in placeholder macro
mai-sdk-rs/src/lib.rs:851 documented item ends in placeholder macro
mai-sdk-rs/src/lib.rs:882 documented item ends in placeholder macro
findings.title: Documented surface with placeholder body

findings.description: Backend integration surfaces should not retain multiple stub or placeholder signals.
evidence: mai-sdk-python/src/mai/client.py 2 placeholder signals in adapter/backend/client surface
findings.title: Adapter/client placeholder density

findings.description: Completion/security claims need implementation evidence when placeholders remain nearby.
evidence: compliance-dashboard/tests/test_dashboard.py contains completion/security claims and placeholder language
docs/acquisition/ARCHITECTURE.md contains completion/security claims and placeholder language
docs/ADAPTER-COMPLETION-MATRIX.md contains completion/security claims and placeholder language
docs/COGENT-DEPLOYMENT-ROADMAP.md contains completion/security claims and placeholder language
docs/dougherty/JOHN-REMEDIATION-PLAN.md contains completion/security claims and placeholder language
docs/dougherty/JOHN-REMEDIATION-ROSTER.md contains completion/security claims and placeholder language
docs/HANDOFF.md contains completion/security claims and placeholder language
docs/HUMAN-TOUCH-AUDIT.md contains completion/security claims and placeholder language
docs/INDEX.md contains completion/security claims and placeholder language
docs/JOHN-REMEDIATION-PLAN.md contains completion/security claims and placeholder language
docs/JOHN-REMEDIATION-ROSTER.md contains completion/security claims and placeholder language
docs/KNOWN-ISSUES.md contains completion/security claims and placeholder language
findings.title: Polished completion claims beside placeholders

findings.description: Broad errors that pass, return None, or default silently hide broken paths.
findings.title: Silent broad error handling

findings.description: Assertions should validate outcomes rather than merely confirming execution.
evidence: apps/operator/tests/test_smoke.py:22 assert spec is not None
apps/rag-reference/tests/test_smoke.py:23 assert spec is not None
findings.title: Thin smoke assertions

findings.description: Repeated blocks across modules suggest copy-forward implementation that deserves review.
findings.title: Duplicated boilerplate blocks

findings.description: Lock files make installs deterministic.
findings.title: Missing dependency lock file
